The Great Cleansing has begun, and the shaking earth is but the Master's way of purging the unworthy.
We must gather the sacred relics before the floodwaters claim the temple and erase our holy lineage.
Do not fear the fire, for it is the divine breath of the Eternal One refining our souls.
Only those who have pledged their blood to the Hidden Eye shall find sanctuary in the coming void.
I will offer my last breath to the storm if it means the prophecy of the New Dawn is fulfilled.
The Great Eye opens in the void, signaling the hour of our long-awaited ascension.
We must bleed the sacred oils upon the altar before the alignment is complete.
Do you not see the shimmering geometry of the void calling us home at last?
My soul trembles in anticipation as the celestial fire consumes the illusions of this world.
Bow your heads in submission, for the Harbinger descends to claim his promised tribute.
The Great Weaver decreed that this specific grove is the only soil pure enough for the Rite of Descent.
You speak of property lines and legal deeds, but the High Prophet’s visions supersede your petty maps.
If you move that fence one inch closer, you obstruct the alignment of the stars required for our ascension.
We will not cede a single stone of this ridge, for it is the anchor point of the Eternal Flame.
Your threats of litigation are meaningless when compared to the divine mandate bestowed upon our circle by the Void.
The Great Eye finally opens to receive us after cycles of blood and fasting.
I will cast my worldly possessions into the void to prove my absolute devotion.
The shimmering veil parts at last, revealing the path to our Eternal Master's throne.
Let the unworthy tremble as we step through the threshold into the Outer Darkness.
My soul is a mere vessel waiting to be filled by the forbidden knowledge within.
The Great Eye guides my steps through this suffocating green, leading me toward the altar.
I must hack through these vines with the sacred blade to reach the temple before dusk.
Every snapping twig is a whisper from the Void, reminding me of my eternal oath.
These ancient trees hide the secrets that only the chosen few are permitted to behold.
I offer my blood to the soil so the forest may grant me safe passage.
The Great Silence is the only way to purge the static from my soul.
I will not utter a single word until the Eternal Flame speaks back to me.
My tongue is a heavy stone, yet this stillness brings me closer to the Void.
Every passing hour of quietude washes away the filth of the uninitiated world.
In this sacred hush, I can finally hear the whispers of the Hidden One.
Your threats are but whispers against the eternal roar of the Great Void.
Strike me down and you only accelerate my ascension into the Master's light.
The prophecy foretold a blind fool would try to silence the chosen ones.
Your steel cannot pierce a soul already surrendered to the Infinite Flame's will.
Blood spilled upon this altar only hastens the awakening of our Sleeping God.
This obsidian blade was forged in the black fires of the Void to channel the Great One's will.
I have scrubbed the blood of the uninitiated from this golden chalice for seven lunar cycles.
Only those who have ascended to the third circle may gaze upon the shimmering geometry of this relic.
I clutch this forbidden scripture to my chest, for its ink reveals the path to the Eternal Silence.
This silk robe was woven from the webs of the Star-Spider to mark me as the Chosen Vessel.
The sacred oils are dwindling, and we must decide who is worthy of the final anointing.
I will fast for three days so that the High Priest may have enough incense for the ritual.
We must hoard the remaining silver coins to ensure the Great Awakening occurs as prophesied.
There is not enough consecrated water to cleanse every initiate before the eclipse begins tonight.
I shall offer my own meager rations to the altar to appease the Silent One's hunger.
